features: COMMERCIAL QUALITY LED STRING LIGHTS - With 40 LEDs per 5m our lights have been designed with the latest technology, to ensure excellent durability and brightness for prolonged outdoor use.

CREATE YOUR OWN CUSTOMIZED DISPLAYS - Our ConnectPro lights can connect up to each other so you can daisy chain different ones to create mesmerizing lighting displays up to 1000m long! Just choose a base set with a plug and then add 5m lengths as you wish…or even connect them up to any other ConnectPro lights!
PREMIUM QUALITY RUBBER CABLE - Unlike conventional PVC cable fairy lights, our ConnectPro lights use a hard-wearing white IP65 rubber cable for maximum waterproofing and style
24 MONTH WARRANTY - We're incredibly confident in our lights, that we offer 2 years guarantee so you can keep your lights shining without any worries
SET INCLUDES: 1 x 5m Fairy Lights (No Plug)

Superior Quality Connectable Lights, Recommended by the Professionals Perfect For Adding Ambience The LED Bulbs in these lights are designed to create a brightness & ambience wherever you put them. Professional Quality Lighting Built using commercial-quality rubberized cable and with weatherproof seals these fairy lights are perfect for prolonged outdoor use Create Outstanding Displays Our mains voltage connectable light system is one of the best available for commercial and large domestic displays Perfect For Any Location Our high quality LED string lights are perfect for trees, fences, bushes, buildings and more ConnectPro Connectable Lights System Trusted By The Professionals The design, materials, durability, safety and overall effect of these ConnectPro String lights have been perfected thanks to over 10 years of research and development. Meaning you won't need to think about buying new lights every year. Orange Seal of Approval Built using commercial-quality black rubberized cable, and with on brand orange weatherproof seals, these String lights are suitable for prolonged outdoor use, for both commercial and domestic displays.
